Regime Rule: 20-day realized volatility vs rolling 252-day median; 200-day moving average trend; regime labels shifted one day
Notes: Benchmark regime map. QQQ buy-and-hold had strong overall return, but regime summaries showed major trend sensitivity: uptrend returns were strong while downtrend returns were nearly flat with high volatility.

Regime Rule: 20-day realized volatility vs rolling 252-day median; 200-day moving average trend; regime labels shifted one day
Signal Rule: Hold QQQ when trailing 60-day momentum is positive; otherwise hold cash
Notes: Momentum reduced drawdown and improved Sharpe versus buy-and-hold, but gave up raw return and net profit. Regime summary suggests momentum improved behavior in downtrends and low-volatility regimes, while giving up significant upside in high-volatility and uptrend periods.

Regime Rule: 20-day realized volatility vs rolling 252-day median; 200-day moving average trend; regime labels shifted one day
Signal Rule: Hold QQQ when trailing 60-day momentum is positive and volatility regime is low; otherwise hold cash
Notes: Low-volatility filter reduced exposure and drawdown but weakened return and risk-adjusted performance materially versus EXP-002. The filter removed all high-volatility exposure, but this also removed meaningful return opportunities.

Regime Rule: 20-day realized volatility vs rolling 252-day median; 200-day moving average trend; regime labels shifted one day
Signal Rule: Hold QQQ when trailing 60-day momentum is positive and trend regime is uptrend; otherwise hold cash
Notes: Uptrend filter reduced drawdown versus plain momentum and performed better than the strict low-volatility filter, but still gave up too much return and Sharpe versus EXP-002. Trend filter was less damaging than volatility filter but did not improve overall strategy quality.

Regime Rule: 20-day realized volatility vs rolling 252-day median; 200-day moving average trend; regime labels shifted one day
Signal Rule: Hold QQQ when trailing 60-day momentum is positive, volatility regime is low, and trend regime is uptrend; otherwise hold cash
Notes: Combined low-volatility uptrend filter was very restrictive and produced weak return and risk-adjusted performance. It preserved drawdown control but underperformed plain momentum, uptrend-filtered momentum, and buy-and-hold by a wide margin.
